recent: From my perspective, effective learning requires both effort and reflection.	在我看来，高效学习既需要努力，也需要反思。
Only by taking action can we turn goals into real progress.	只有付诸行动，我们才能把目标变成真正的进步。
Writing improves when ideas become more organized.	当想法更有条理时，写作也会进步。
Confidence grows when preparation becomes a habit.	当准备变成习惯时，自信也会增长。
A clear goal makes effort more focused.	清晰的目标会让努力更聚焦。
